items.title: [Latest] Global Backup Power Market Size/Share Worth USD 32.95 Billion by 2034 at a 5.8% CAGR: Custom Market Insights (Analysis, Outlook, Leaders, Report, Trends, Forecast, Segmentation, Growth Rate, Value, SWOT Analysis)
items.description: [220+ Pages Latest Report] According to a market research study published by Custom Market Insights, the demand analysis of Global Backup Power Market size & share revenue was valued at approximately USD 18.82 Billion in 2024 and is expected to reach USD 19.78 Billion in 2025 and is expected to reach around USD 32.95 Billion by 2034, at a CAGR of 5.8% between 2025 and 2034. items.title: Norway dumps stake in Caterpillar over West Bank links
items.description: Norway’s wealth fund has dumped its £1.8bn holding in Caterpillar over concerns Israel is destroying Palestinian homes with its bulldozers.

items.title: Norwegian Wealth Fund Ditches Caterpillar Over Israel’s Bulldozer Use
items.description: An independent body recommended the move as it said the company’s bulldozers were being used by Israel to destroy Palestinian homes.

items.title: Norway’s Sovereign-Wealth Fund to Shed Caterpillar Stake
items.description: An independent body recommended the move as it said the company’s bulldozers were being used by Israel to destroy Palestinian homes.
